final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center suitable for small display sizes
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — unified into a single cohesive icon or character
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, energetic, friendly atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet balanced direction that reads well across both light and dark platform UIs — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or iconography that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture or religion; must remain visually legible and harmonious at small avatar sizes (e.g., 40px–200px)
Avoid: must avoid flags, political symbols, religious icons, hand gestures with culturally specific meanings, and any imagery that could be perceived as offensive or exclusionary to any demographic
